transcript.text:
[This video was produced with the Ministry of Oceans and Fisheries for the development of tuna farming in Korea. This video contains contents of economic interests and awareness of tuna from the Ministry of Oceans and Fisheries and Tzuyang was NOT paid separate contributions and production costs to post this video]
[A peaceful village of tunas]
[A war with the tunas]
It's as big as me!
Can you eat it all by yourself? Try it
[Challenge accepted]
[Today's mukbang series: Bluefin Tuna Day]
[Last episode from Yokji Island]
[A special thanks to all the Yokji island villagers]
Please come see me if you come here again
Yes ma'am I will be back
Thank you for everything
Hello everyone~
I am here at the Tuna farm
The Ministry of Oceans and Fisheries found out that I was here And they wanted to show me some Tuna
And to feed me some as well

That's mainly why I'm here
I've always had frozen tuna, but never a fresh-caught tuna
So I'm very curious
Let's go ahead and see what it's like
That's huge!
[Tuna Farm]
[Arrived]
This is the tuna farm and it's enormous
I just saw 1, it's over there
Do you see that?
There are so many of them
They are all as big as me
I really want to try (eat) it
[Tunas' meals]
They are huge!
Excuse me,

I want to feed them too
It won't be easy
Is it difficult?
Will you be okay? Yes!
Nice throw
[Half mackerel, Half tuna]
How do you guys catch these?
[Mackerels as baits]
[Cranes as fishing poles]
They weigh 60kg to 110kg
The crane will pull them up
Where did they go? They were all over the mackerels just now
They are intelligent creatures,
They know we are here to catch them
Really?
Oh no!

I need to eat
They won't even come near the fishing pole
So let's just have very limited people come
[Not even a nibble]
Why won't they take the mackerel? I would've destroyed that bait by now
Right? It will be so easy to fish Tzuyang
Big one, big one
A big one, please!
[40 minutes later]
[Got it!]
They got it, They got it, They got it, They got it, They got it
[Tzu-excited]
[It's Tzuyang!]
That's amazing
[Capture complete]
It's so big

They're pulling it up with the crane
They tie up the tail, Wow, it's humongous
Do you guys see that?
[Monstrous Tuna]
It's as big as me
[About 180cm long, 90kg heavy]
It's longer than me It's 180cm long
So amazing I can't even get the whole thing on camera
I've never seen a tuna that big in front of me
Let alone eat one
I will go try it
It's so big
[Cut & Butcher Start]
[This video was produced with bluefin tuna provided by the Ministry of Oceans and Fisheries for the development of tuna culture in Korea]
Bon Appetit
It's my very first time trying this I've always had frozen ones

They gave me all the expensive parts
These parts are all near the belly
This meat is from near the belly button fat
And right here is from the Entrails (O-toro)
And below that is the abdomen meat (Chu-toro)
These right here are the Kama (O-toro) and cheeks
It doesn't seem like a lot of food
But these are cut into thick pieces
So they weigh about 4kg total
You can't finish that by yourself
That's too much fat for 1 person
A normal person could never
[Viewer: You will get sick of the same taste] Well, there are different ways to eat a tuna
[Viewer: Do you have dried seaweed?] They said I won't be needing it
Soy sauce is all I need for this
Let's finally try it now Bon Appetit

I'm nervous
Let's try the less fatty meat Mid-abdomen
Just the tuna itself
Slightly dip in soy sauce
Wow, the taste is very..
Different
It just melted in my mouth It's so much soft than frozen tuna
1 more time
It's very different
There's no way
Meat from the entrails (Kama - O-toro)
It's very taste with the soy sauce Really
I don't need any other dipping sauce
It disappeared
I can chew this part, but the rest just melt in your mouth
Finished

This is the head/jaw meat
They typically call it the head meat
Let's find out
Pure happiness
It's so delicious
Belly button meat! I love this part (Kama-toro)
What did you say this one was?
That's the meat in between the jaw and the belly
It tastes so good
I'll try it with the oil dip
It tastes good with the oil too
Let's take 2 pieces
Wow, this is
It tastes better with the soy sauce That's so cool
[Viewer: Anyone like to eat this with the sweet & sour chili sauce?] This will be a waste to eat with that
Because you can only taste the sauce if you do that

Then you can't taste any of the tuna
I seriously think it will just melt on my tongue if I just keep it there
It really did
Want to see the belly button meat? (kama-toro)
The visuals
I can taste that it's a bit more fatty
It holds the oil and it slowly releases over time
It's a very tasty oil
Soju? (Korean alcoholic drink) No, no
So tasty
They are butchering up the head right now
Thank you, What is this?
It's the meat below the eyes
It looks like a cow meat
It's so yummy
Even I can't eat it because it's so precious

So good
This one tastes so good
What is this?
On top of the head It has muscle strings so it can be chewy
But it's really good if you keep chewing
It's so good because I've been eating fatty meat
Right?
You can't really get a lot of this meat, right?
Yes, correct Only small bits from every tuna
Why do delicious foods come in small portions?
This is a different part
What is this?
This is very similar to a cow meat
It's the meat on top of the mouth
It looks just like the tartare I ate from Daegu
Will it taste like tartare?

Wow, it really is like a cow meat
These special pieces are very delicious
It's so good
What is this?
This is the cheek meat
This is the cheek
This is literally the best
The texture is amazing
Here comes the last special part
It's the meat on the sides of the head
Very oily and tasty
It's definitely different
This really melts in my mouth
[Viewer: canned-tuna is the best]
What!? This 1 piece over the canned-tuna
[Let's try to eat it in different ways]

[Change in styles]
[Tuna sushi]
Sushi places don't give you pieces like this Where the rice is small and the meat is big
So delicious
[Next dish]
[Cooled-tuna]
It tastes better chilled
[Amazing]
[Watching her show live]
It's oily because it's fresh unlike the frozen tuna
[They are whispering so they don't interrupt Tzuyang]
Kama-toro
So good
This is poke bowl made from the tuna we caught
Really? Yay, yummy Thank you
Poke bowl

The color of the rice is...!? Oh it's seasoned rice
So good
Take the dried seaweed on top, And put the roe (Tobiko)
[What's next?]
[Seared Tuna (Tataki)]
Wow, this is seriously
It's so good
The inside is very chewy
It's different from all the Tatakis I had
Tastes so much better
Eating this tastes better after eating this
[Cold spicy sashimi with vegetables]
Thank you
The soup is so good
Very savory, sweet, and spicy
A bit thick too

Tasty
Only if I had some thin-noodles
This is it!
So good
Body meat
This tastes good too
I never thought I'd be eating tuna like this as a whole
I've seen other YouTubers eat like this And I've been wanting to try it
Thanks everyone
I've been in Yokji Island for about a month now
I am leaving tomorrow
There were so many people that helped me on this journey
I will be sharing these tuna sashimi to the villagers
[She prepared them herself]
[With a thankful heart]
[All done!]

[This video was produced with bluefin tuna provided by the Ministry of Oceans and Fisheries for the development of tuna culture in Korea]
[The place she re-visited as soon as she came to the island]
I am here to share this with you
Thank you
You made this yourself?
[So precious]
I'm sad that she's leaving
People always ask me about Tzuyang
I was so happy that she was here for a month
We've gotten so close
Please take care of your health, I will be back
[The restaurant that had good abalone porridge]
Is this a "good-bye"?
What is this? We prepared this from the tuna farm
But it in the fridge and eat it over some days
You've done such a great job here in the island

I will be back for the cold sashimi soup
I will give you a whole bucket of it
[The place that was closed for 3 visits]
It's closed today too!?
[No bean sprout, No shin ramyun restaurant]
What?
We prepared this from the tuna farm
You are going back to Seoul now?
Yes, I'm leaving tomorrow
Thank you
[So precious]
Good luck with your future endeavors
Come back again
Most definitely
1 month passed by so quickly Right!?
[The kimbap master]

I brought some tuna for you
Store it in the fridge and eat it cold
Thank you Good luck to you
We will watch your videos
Promise? Yes
My kids watch you too
I will be back again Okay~
[Fishing Village Chief]
You were my favorite
This is for you
Please be healthy and come again
Thank you very much
Take care of your health
[Photo time with the village kids]
[He helped her with a lot of stuff]
I'm going back to Seoul tomorrow

Tzuyang is the best!
[Head of the village]
I didn't even do anything for you No no,
The corn was very delicious
We will be rooting for you
Thank you
[And]
[She became a regular at this cold noodle restaurant] Hello
Did you come right now?
I'm not here to eat
I'm leaving tomorrow
You're leaving? Why?
It's already been a month here, I need to go
I thought you were staying longer
I'm deeply saddened
Didn't I come here to eat like 10 times?

Right, you were a regular here
This is for us? I needed to prepare something for you instead
No, no it's okay
When are you leaving?
First thing in the morning
Then when are you coming back?
Sometime in the future
[Thank you for everything]
I don't look good here No way~
Take 1 again for us
It's much better than before
I'm tearing up
I will come back, I promise
I will come here for sure
Please come see me again Yes ma'am
I will be back

[Thank you]
[We want to sincerely thank the Yokji island villagers who cooperated with us with filming this series and the subscribers who watched this series]
[Subtitles by Hyun Choi] [antharoni@gmail.com]
